query:
-- Check how monthlyCost was set on these services — look at the costSource and any SasBoss-specific data
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.costSource,
  s.provider,
  s.billingPlatform,
  s.discoveryNotes
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%'
  AND s.costSource = 'supplier_invoice'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')
ORDER BY s.planName, s.monthlyCost;
command:

-- Check how monthlyCost was set on these services — look at the costSource and any SasBoss-specific data
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.costSource,
  s.provider,
  s.billingPlatform,
  s.discoveryNotes
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%'
  AND s.costSource = 'supplier_invoice'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')
ORDER BY s.planName, s.monthlyCost;
